rules.emitsFact: TERMINATION: container stopped via SIGTERM then SIGKILL (orderly stop, exit 137)
rules.conclusionSummary: Container stopped via SIGTERM/SIGKILL (orderly stop); boot log shows signal 15 → grace period → signal 9 → exit 137.

rules.emitsFact: EVIDENCE: container exited without writing any application output
rules.conclusionSummary: The container exited{exit_status} without writing any application output — there is nothing in the logs to analyze. If this exit is unexpected, check whether the command writes errors to stdout/stderr.
conclusionActions: Run `container logs {container}` to confirm no output was produced
If unexpected, run the container's command manually to see its error output
